title: Creative Advertisement Banner Designer Needed
desc: I run a busy printing press and need a fresh, creative-and-artistic card designer,flex designer, banner designed for an upcoming advertising campaign. This banner will be the first of many jobs—once we get this right, I’ll move on to visiting cards, flex boards and other print collateral with the same designer, so I’m hoping to build an ongoing relationship. For the initial task I need a striking advertisement banner that immediately grabs attention on the street. Bold colour work, eye-catching typography and imaginative composition are all welcome; I’m far less interested in safe, traditional layouts. Deliverables (for this first banner) • Print-ready file at full size (CMYK, 300 DPI) • Editable source file (AI, CDR or PSD) • Two revision rounds included Please send: • A link to a portfolio piece that best matches a creative, artistic advertising style • Your all-inclusive price for this banner, plus a quick note on how you prefer to structure pricing for follow-up items like visiting cards and flex designs Turnaround is flexible for the right look, but faster is always appreciated. Looking forward to seeing what you can do.

title: Creative Brochure Design for Premium Business Brand
desc: ’m looking for a talented designer to create a modern and premium-looking brochure for my business. The brochure should have a clean layout, strong typography, and a professional visual style that represents the brand properly. This is not just a basic layout project — I want something visually polished and high-end. What I’ll provide: Content/text Brand colors/logo Reference inspiration What I need from you: Creative brochure layout Modern visual presentation Print-ready final design Deliverables: High-quality PDF Editable source file (AI/PSD/Figma)

title: Creative Designer - Social Media & Campaigns (Gen Z Expertise)
desc: We are looking for a Creative Designer who knows to adapt its design expertise to the client's brand and goal. It must have experience in strategic thinking/brainstorming and Gen Z audience expertise. If everything goes well, this is a long-term collaboration with a fast-moving team. What you will work on - Social media creatives for Instagram, TikTok (carousels, static posts, animated posts, stories, ads). - Creative direction: visual concepts, art direction for Instagram and TikTok social media posts. - Fast-turnaround deliverables that maintain high visual standards. What we need from you - Strong portfolio showing social media design work. - Proven understanding of Gen Z visual culture: what's trending, what performs, and why. - Proven understanding and experience on creative direction. - Fast, clear communication and the ability to work with deadlines without hand-holding. Nice to have - Experience designing for Europe and MENA region. - Familiarity with performance marketing creatives. - Motion design skills. To apply Share your portfolio and answer this in your cover note (in under 100 words): Describe one piece of work you're proud of and why it performed (visually or commercially).

title: Custom Print Image Design
desc: I’m putting together a presentation and I need a single, polished image that is ready both for print and for the screen. The core of the job is straightforward: create a high-resolution graphic that can be sent to the printer without any extra adjustments and still look crisp when dropped into my slide deck. Here’s what will help the project run smoothly: • Final artwork delivered in CMYK (print) and RGB (presentation) • Minimum size: 300 DPI at 8.5" × 11" (or larger if you recommend it) • Editable source file (AI or PSD) plus a flattened PDF/PNG for quick use Feel free to suggest the best layout, color treatment, or typography to make the message pop. Once I approve the concept, a single round of minor tweaks should get us to the finish line.

title: Custom Professional Presentation Designer Needed for 50-Slide Deck
desc: We are looking for a talented presentation designer to create a polished, professional, and visually compelling 50-slide deck. This is a custom design project, we are not looking for template edits. We need original layouts, thoughtful visual hierarchy, and a cohesive design language throughout the entire deck. The content will be provided to the selected designer upon hiring. Custom slide design built from scratch, no stock templates Clean typography, strong hierarchy, and well-balanced use of white space Editable file delivered in PowerPoint (.pptx) or Google Slides format All fonts and assets are properly embedded or linked Proven experience designing professional presentations (please share portfolio) Ability to work with provided content and bring it to life visually Responsive communication and willingness to incorporate feedback Availability to start immediately and commit to the 7-day timeline At least 1–2 revisions included in your proposal Please submit your proposal with the following: a link to your portfolio or 2–3 relevant presentation samples. Applications without portfolio samples will not be considered.

title: Custom Rickshaw Ad Design
desc: We are seeking a creative designer to craft a unique ad piece for a rickshaw advertisement. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and advertising, with a strong understanding of visual storytelling and audience engagement. The project involves designing an eye-catching ad that effectively communicates our brand message and appeals to our target audience. If you have a passion for innovative design and a knack for capturing attention, we would love to hear from you!

title: Custom Vibrant Abstract Sticker Pack
desc: I’m putting together a set of personal-use stickers that feel fresh, fun and unmistakably mine. The overall vibe should be bright and colorful, with bold abstract patterns rather than literal objects or characters. Think flowing shapes, energetic lines, playful geometry—anything that instantly lifts the mood when slapped on a laptop, water bottle or phone case. Here’s how I picture the workflow: • Concept sketches that show a range of abstract motifs so I can pick the strongest direction. • Final artwork delivered as scalable vectors (AI or SVG) plus high-resolution PNGs with transparent backgrounds. • Each design outlined with a clean cut-line layer, ready for die-cut printing. I’d like around 10 individual stickers in assorted sizes (roughly 2"–4"), all sharing a coherent color palette yet looking unique enough to mix and match. Please keep the files organized and clearly labeled so I can hand them straight to the print shop. Creative freedom is important—surprise me with inventive shapes and daring color harmonies—but keep legibility in mind; no tiny intricate details that might disappear at small scale. Once you send the final set, I’ll do a quick print test. If everything trims smoothly and the colors pop as intended, we’re done.

title: Cut Out Furniture in Photoshop
desc: I need someone to cut out a piece of furniture in Photoshop. The task involves using the pen tool to create a path around the furniture and then saving it as a PNG with a transparent background. The image should be high resolution and ready for use in a design project. Attention to detail is important to ensure a clean and professional result.

title: DL Flyer Design
desc: I have a flyer that has already been designed and I just need it redone using existing assets to DL Flyer Print quality specifications. I have a mockup completed and all the assets ready to use and the design just needs to be delivered so I can get the printing done tomorrow if possible.

title: Data Visualization Slide Presentation
desc: I need a slide presentation of 30-40 slides that effectively visualizes data for an executive group. The presentation should be visually appealing and easy to understand, ensuring that key insights are clearly communicated. The ideal candidate will have experience in data visualization and presentation design, with a strong ability to transform complex data into engaging and informative slides.

title: Desain Kaos Minimalis Hitam Putih
desc: Saya membutuhkan seorang desainer yang bisa membuat konsep kaos bergaya minimalis, hanya menggunakan palet hitam dan putih. Fokusnya adalah: • Menyusun tipografi yang bersih dan mudah dibaca pada area depan kaos. • Mengedit foto atau elemen ilustrasi sederhana agar tampak “aesthetic” lalu memadukannya secara harmonis dengan teks. • Menyiapkan file final siap cetak dalam format AI, EPS, dan PNG ber-resolusi tinggi (300 dpi). Saya lebih suka workflow di Adobe Illustrator dan Photoshop agar mudah diproduksi di sablon digital maupun DTG. Kirimkan portofolio singkat desain kaos serupa serta perkiraan waktu yang Anda perlukan.

title: Design 1/4 A4 Trifold Brochure
desc: We are seeking a skilled graphic designer to create a 1/4 A4 trifold brochure. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design. The project involves designing a visually appealing and informative brochure that aligns with our brand identity. Attention to detail and creativity are essential for this role.

title: Design Brochure, Flyer, and Sticker
desc: I need someone to help me design a brochure, a flyer, and a sticker for The Family Table. The brochure and flyer should easily communicate what The Family Table is about and include a call to action, possibly with a qr code or link. The Flyer should stick out when put on the table with other flyers, so thinking bold colors and fonts. We want people to get drawn to it. The stickers should be simple enough to grasp someone's attention while biking by as those stickers will be attached to traffic lights in the Amsterdam City Center.

title: Design PDF
desc: I require a 4 page A5 document to be designed. It should be in a PDF document that we will email to clients. We have all the text / logo / pictures and a sketch of what we are looking for but we need it all brought together.

title: Design Sticker Label for Sample Bags
desc: Design a sticker label for sample bags that includes compliance information such as ingredients and a logo. The label should be visually appealing and ensure all necessary details are clearly visible. The design should be suitable for printing on small bags.

title: Design Stickers for Mirrors
desc: We need a design similar to the example provided for stickers to be applied to mirrors. We want a design that is exactly the same, using gold and beige colors as shown in the image. There are 14 straight mirrors and 5 round mirrors, and we want to apply the same pattern to them.

title: Design a 1-Page Case Study
desc: I'm looking for a designer to create a professional one-page case study PDF for my business, SE Digital Solutions. The case study is based on a successful automation project completed for a client. The goal is to use this PDF in email outreach and sales conversations. I already have the content, metrics, and key results. I need someone to turn the information into a polished, professional, and visually appealing one-pager. I'm looking for someone who would understand my style and needs, and turn that into a product. I will need support with design-related tasks, so I'd love to build a partnership for project-based work. What You'll Do - Design a professional 1-page PDF case study - Create a clean and modern layout - Use icons, graphics, and visual elements to highlight results - Present the information in a way that is easy to read and understand Information I'll Provide - Case study content - Project details - Before and after metrics - Company logo and branding - Client name and logo Ideal Candidate - Able to turn this around within 2–3 business days - Responsive and open to round of revisions Please Include: - 1–2 samples of similar work - Your estimated timeline - Your fixed-price quote - A short note explaining who you are and why you're a good fit

title: Design and Marketing Expert for Signage
desc: I am looking for a design and marketing expert to create a set of cohesive signage for my short-term rentals. The signage will be posted both indoors and around the house. The ideal candidate should have experience in both design and marketing to ensure the signage effectively communicates the brand and encourage guests to easily navigate the house, act responsibly around the house, leave good reviews and come back to the house for future visits. I have branding material and the words that I'd like to use. I need someone with a design eye to make the signage professional appearing.

title: Designer for Bible Conversation Cards
desc: Seeking a designer to create conversation cards based on the Parsha of the week. The cards should be visually appealing and easy to read, with a modern and clean design. The project involves designing 5-7 cards per week, with each card featuring a question and a quote. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and illustration, and be able to deliver high-quality designs within a short timeframe.

title: Designer for Brochure Creation
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a professional brochure for our company. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and be proficient in using InDesign and Photoshop. The brochure should effectively communicate our brand's message and values, and be visually appealing to our target audience. If you have a portfolio showcasing your previous work in brochure design, we would love to see it.

title: Designer to help with slide deck creation
desc: We have an existing HTML file that needs to be reformatted into one of our branded Google Slides templates and converted to white/light mode. Straightforward task for someone comfortable working in Google Slides and using Claude Design. What's involved: - Take content from a provided HTML file and drop it into our existing Google Slides template - Reformat slides to fit the template layout and style - Convert the deck to white mode (we'll provide guidance on the colour palette) - Light copy/layout adjustments as needed to ensure consistency across slides - Final deck is approximately 22–23 slides You're a good fit if you: - Are proficient in Google Slides (not just PowerPoint-to-Slides transfers) - Have a clean eye for layout, spacing, and type hierarchy - Can work from an existing brand template without going off-piste - Communicate clearly and turn around work quickly

title: Digital Banner Design for Hotel
desc: We are seeking a skilled graphic designer to create digital banners for our hotel. The banners should be visually appealing and effectively communicate our brand message. The ideal candidate will have experience in banner ad design and be proficient in Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator. Creativity and attention to detail are essential for this role.

title: Digital Designer for Client Presentation
desc: We are seeking a digital designer to create a cohesive presentation for a client using our provided content. The content is currently a mix of different slides and design types, requiring organization and a professional touch. The ideal candidate will have experience in presentation design and graphic design to ensure the final product is visually appealing and effective. The end result needs to be a Powerpoint presentation, where elements such as graphs, colors and texts are easily edited within Powerpoint, no external "links".

title: Digital E-Catalog Creation
desc: We are looking for a high-level E-Catalog Designer to transform our product list into a stunning, interactive digital experience. This isn’t just a PDF; we want a digital catalog that engages our customers, works seamlessly across devices, and drives sales. The Scope of Work • Design & Layout: Create a clean, modern, and professional e-catalog layout (approx. 80 pages). • Interactivity: Implement clickable table of contents, external product links, and embedded media (if applicable). • Optimized UX: Ensure the catalog is lightweight for fast loading but high-quality for zooming and mobile viewing. • Brand Alignment: Follow our existing brand guidelines while pushing the creative envelope. Once project is complete, we want the native source file. Seriously inquiries only. Other interesting project work is available contingent upon successful completion of this assignment.

title: Document Design and Formatting
desc: I need someone to design a document because the one I have is not the right format. I need the same thing redone in one long document file and put into a canva website design as it will be sent as a landing page.

title: Electronic Billboard Advertisement Designer
desc: I need a designer to enhance my electronic billboard advertisement. I have AI-generated photo examples but want a more authentic, personal touch. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and advertising, and be able to bring a unique perspective to the project. The goal is to create an eye-catching and effective advertisement that stands out on electronic billboards.

title: Elegant Brochure & Catalogue Design
desc: A classic, refined aesthetic is essential for both a new tri-fold brochure and a comprehensive product catalogue that showcase my brand’s quality and heritage. The job covers concept development, layout, typography and image placement, all while keeping a timeless, high-end feel. Deliver the finished pieces in fully editable files—InDesign or Illustrator preferred—along with print-ready PDFs so I can adjust or localise content later without recreating the artwork. Past work that proves skill with elegant, minimal design speaks louder than words; please include a few relevant samples so I can gauge fit quickly. Once we agree on the visual direction, I will supply brand assets, copy and product imagery. Final approval hinges on print-ready resolution, consistent styling between brochure and catalogue, and cleanly organised layers that make future edits hassle-free.

title: Elegant Digital Product Catalogue Design
desc: I need a classic and elegant digital PDF product catalogue designed. Requirements: - Visually appealing layout - High-quality images - Clear, concise product descriptions - Easy navigation Ideal skills and experience: - Graphic design expertise - Experience with digital PDF formats - Portfolio showcasing classic and elegant designs Please include samples of similar work.

title: Elegant Promotional Brochure Design
desc: I’m looking for a designer who can craft a classic, elegant promotional brochure that instantly communicates quality and professionalism. The piece will serve as a key marketing tool, so it needs to balance refined aesthetics with clear, persuasive messaging. Here’s what I have in mind: • A clean, timeless look—think tasteful typography, generous white space, and a cohesive color palette that feels sophisticated rather than flashy. • Print-ready files prepared to industry standards, plus editable source files so my team can update copy in the future. • Final artwork delivered in both high-resolution PDF (for press) and web-optimized PDF (for email). I’ll supply brand guidelines, copy, and any required imagery as soon as we kick off. Once you share an initial concept, I’d like the opportunity for two rounds of revisions to fine-tune layout and visual hierarchy. If you have a portfolio that reflects a similar classic style, I’d love to see it. Let’s collaborate to create a brochure that elevates our brand and drives results.

title: Engaging Brochure Design Project
desc: I’m looking for a creative designer to turn my existing content into a brochure that instantly draws readers in and encourages them to explore further. The focus is user engagement, so every element—from layout and typography to imagery and calls-to-action—needs to guide the reader naturally through the information and leave them eager to respond. Here’s what I’ll supply: • All copy, logos, and brand colour references • A rough outline of the sections to include • Any high-resolution photos I already own What I’d like back from you: • A professionally designed tri-fold (or alternative fold you recommend) brochure in print-ready CMYK PDF • A web-optimised PDF for easy sharing online • Source files (Adobe InDesign, Illustrator, or compatible alternative) so future edits are simple Acceptance criteria: 1. Visual hierarchy clearly leads the reader through each section. 2. Fonts and colours match my existing brand palette. 3. Final files meet standard commercial print specs (3 mm bleed, 300 dpi). If you have a portfolio that shows similar marketing collateral—especially pieces that boosted reader interaction—please share the link. I’m ready to start as soon as I find the right designer.

title: Engaging Promotional Poster Design
desc: I’m looking for a graphic designer who can craft a bold, modern poster for publicite. The artwork needs to grab attention at first glance, follow current design trends, and communicate my message clearly. Scope • One-page poster sized for both print and digital use. • Visual style: contemporary, colourful, and brand-aligned. • Final files: print-ready PDF (CMYK), web-ready JPEG/PNG, and editable source (AI or PSD). What I’ll provide • Core copy and key imagery. • Brand colours and any mandatory logos. What I expect • Two initial concepts to choose from. • Up to two revision rounds on the selected direction. • Delivery of all agreed file formats on approval. If you have a portfolio that shows eye-catching posters or related promotional materials, I’d love to see it.

title: Enhance PowerPoint Presentation
desc: I'm looking for someone to take a PowerPoint that I have created and make it beautiful and modern. The task involves transforming an existing presentation into a more visually appealing format. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and presentation design to ensure the final product is professional and engaging.

title: Enhance Villa Brochure Design
desc: I need a designer to enhance a 24-page brochure for a villa in Greece. The task involves using the same photos and text but making the brochure look more professional and beautiful. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and brochure design, ensuring the final product is visually appealing and polished.

title: Expert Logo Designer Needed
desc: We are seeking an expert logo designer to create a professional logo and corresponding support pieces. The ideal candidate will have a strong portfolio in logo design and be able to deliver high-quality work. The project involves creating a logo that aligns with our brand identity and additional support pieces to enhance our brand presence. We already have an essentially final logo and just need it replicated, and have the following Deliverables completed. Deliverables Checklist: Logo Files: EPS, SVG, AI, PDF, PNG transparent Versions: Full institutional, Simplified embroidery, One-color, Reversed white, Icon only, Horizontal layout, Vertical layout Brand Guide: typography, spacing, colors, misuse examples, embroidery guidance, minimum sizing

title: Expert Logo Designer to design a logo
desc: I am looking for an expert logo designer to finalise the master logo for my business. The creative concept is already complete. I have selected my final logo: a standalone "Flow and Circularity" emblem. Your job is to prepare this into a pixel-perfect, mathematically balanced file package. 1. I need the following for logo design: • High-resolution SVG files (optimized for web) • PNG files with transparent background in multiple sizes (512px, 1024px, 2000px, and 5000px+) • EPS and PDF versions (for print) • High-resolution JPG versions • Editable source files (.AI or Figma preferred) 2. Need these variations for the same logo: • Full colour version • Black version • White version (for dark backgrounds) • Monochrome / grayscale version • Vertical / Stacked version • Icon-only version • Text-only version 3. I will provide: • Exact color codes (Hex) • Font name(s), weight and styles used in the logo • Minimum clear space / exclusion zone and minimum size recommendations for logo design 4. Other Important Points • Please confirm I will receive full commercial ownership and rights to the final designs. • Also let me know the timeline for final delivery.

title: Facebook ad
desc: I wish to create a few business Facebook ads to increase my customers. Think of moving images for my ads, something eye catchy low budget ads. If you have the experience and can communicate in English. Also be punctual and efficient please apply.

title: Family cookbook
desc: I have a completed cookbook manuscript with all recipes written and high-resolution photographs supplied. I'm looking for professional interior layout, cookbook formatting, table of contents, and a print-ready PDF for printing. The book is approximately 40 pages.

title: Finish Brochure Design
desc: I have built a basic version of my brochure and have two example pages that are much more detailed on what I am looking for. I need someone to finish the design, ensuring it aligns with the level of detail and quality shown in the examples. The ideal candidate will have experience in brochure design and graphic design and be able to deliver a polished final product.

title: Flyer Design Revamp
desc: We are seeking a creative designer to revamp an existing flyer for our business. The ideal candidate will have experience in flyer design and be able to bring fresh ideas to the project. The task involves updating the layout, graphics, and text to make the flyer more appealing and effective. Attention to detail and creativity are essential for this role.

title: Flyer Design for Front and Back. I will provide the two logo designs.
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a professional flyer, both front and back. The ideal candidate will have experience in flyer design and be able to deliver high-quality work within a short timeframe. Attention to detail and creativity are essential for this role. If you have a portfolio showcasing your previous work, we would love to see it!

title: Flyer Design for Text Message Thread
desc: We are seeking a skilled graphic designer to create a visually appealing flyer that represents a text thread. The ideal candidate will have experience in flyer design and be able to deliver a high-quality, print-ready design. The project is part-time and expected to be completed in less than a month.

title: Flyer design for a new Eco Retreat near Mackay QLD
desc: We are a new Eco retreat opened in March26, we are looking for someone to design a flyer that will attract new bookings though Tourist information centres - we have a logo and some professional photographs ready to use but as a new business we are open to changes

title: Flyers and banners Design
desc: Hello everyone, I need to design 1-2 flyers of A6 or A5 about the opening of gelato shop. Also 3 ad-banners of 3 different sizes for one website without any animation. Please message me in direct for details. Thanks in advance. Katerina

title: Front Page InDesign Template Design
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a professional front page template using InDesign. We already have the final design and just need someone to create a template with placeholders. All fonts are already decided, the size as well. I have attached as reference the final front page with everything filled in, but what we would need is just the template for the text and the image as placeholder. Lastly, I would want the texture of the texture to be recreated of the background and the header for the lower section. The details for the template is: Canvas size: 28.8 x 43.8cm (including 4mm bleed on all sides) Trim size: 28 x 43cm (11x17") Safe area: 4mm inside trim on all sides Resolution: 300 DPI Format: PDF/X-4 Color profile: sRGB, output intent GRACoL 2006 Fonts: embedded or converted to outlines

title: GSlides Presentation Template Development & Graphic Design for Framework/Infographics
desc: Summary We are seeking a skilled graphic designer to create a professional PowerPoint template for our company. The template should include multiple slide types that aligns with our brand identity and is easy to use for our team. The ideal candidate will have experience in creating visually appealing and professional presentations using Microsoft PowerPoint, Google Slides, and Canva, as well as designing frameworks and graphic design depictions of lots of information. Specifically this project includes: Designing a slide template for our client, with joint branding elements Designing a full slide deck for presentation (compilation of our research findings and storyline) Designing 1-3 key frameworks/graphic depictions of information Please provide samples of your previous work. We will also provide you multiple sample decks to model the template and frameworks from. Important capabilities: -visual elegance and accessible UX -quick turnaround time (1-2 days) -good listening and detail orientation as we iterate -adherence to project timeline -good communicator, asks questions, seeks iterative feedback

title: Graphic Artist for Card Design
desc: I need a graphic artist to create a deck of cards design for a PD I am facilitating. The project involves designing a set of cards that align with the theme of the PD, ensuring creativity and visual appeal. The ideal candidate should have experience in card design and be able to deliver high-quality designs within the specified timeframe.

title: Graphic Design for Executive Summary and Infographic
desc: I need someone to graphic design two documents, 1 pagers front and back. The first document is an executive summary, the second document is an infographic. The ideal candidate should have experience in creating visually appealing and professional documents. The project is small in scale and requires intermediate proficiency. The duration is less than 3 weeks, and the engagement is one-time.

title: Graphic Design for Product Catalog
desc: We are looking for a graphic designer to help us improve and restructure an existing product catalogue. The catalogue already exists, but we need a small graphic study and visual refinement, followed by the reorganization of all content and layout to make it clearer, more professional, and easier to read. This is a product catalogue, expected to have around 10 to 20 pages. Scope of Work The work includes: - Reviewing the existing catalogue design - Proposing a cleaner and more structured visual direction - Reorganizing product information across the catalogue - Improving page layout, hierarchy, readability and consistency - Creating a professional catalogue design based on the existing content - Preparing the final file for digital use and/or print, if needed Deliverables - Updated catalogue design, around 10 to 20 pages - Editable source file, preferably in Adobe InDesign, Illustrator. - Final PDF version - Print-ready file

title: Graphic Design for Promotional Materials
desc: I have 18 info graphics that I need modified to match the company's theme. There's a graphic that I need rescaled to be printed on 8.5x11in portrait. And 1 graphic that needs the content modified. Everything will end up being printed.

title: Graphic Designer Needed for Engaging Infographic - Need In 8 Hour's
desc: Looking for a graphic designer to create a clean, modern, and visually engaging 1-page infographic focused on transportation connectivity, accessibility, and economic growth. The infographic should present information in a professional, easy-to-understand, and visually compelling way for public/community audiences. Preferred experience: • Infographic design • Public-sector, civic, transportation, or community-focused projects • Adobe Illustrator • Clean, modern corporate design aesthetics
